name: Chocho
description: Chocho Isac Olmer - music producer and audio branding, Tel-Aviv. Beats, soundtracks and sonic identities.
hero_title:
Hey, I'm Chocho.
I make music in Tel-Aviv.
hero_sub: Beats, soundtracks, sonic identities - if it makes a sound, I'm probably into it. This garden grows when I do.
